=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (8:14-8:24) TS377091: Exported declaration 'lazyEffect' returns a lazy Effect or Stream. Effect and Stream are already lazy, so wrapping them in a zero-argument function adds unnecessary indirection. effect(lazyEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable lazyEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable lazyEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable lazyEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable lazyEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable lazyEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable lazyEffect for entire file"
